name: Ice Cream "Dressups
recipeInstructions:
1. SNAP ICE CREAM: Stir 1 cup coarsely broken gingersnaps or chocolate wafers into vanilla ice cream.
2. COFFEE-RUM ICE CREAM: Melt 1/2 cup chocolate-rum wafers over hot water, add the rum, and swirl through vanilla ice cream.
3. APPLE-SURPRISE ICE CREAM: Mix 1/2 cup canned applesauce, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon. Swirl in streaks through vanilla ice cream.
4. BERRY SWIRL: With a fork, swirl in streaks through vanilla ice cream using 1 cup slightly crushed fresh or just thawed frozen strawberries or raspberries.
5. FUDGE-MARBLED: Melt 1/2 package semisweet chocolate pieces over hot, not boiling water, add 4 tablespoons boiling water and 2 tablespoons milk; stir until smooth. Cool, but do not refrigerate before swirling through vanilla ice cream.
6. GINGER CREAM: Fold 1/4 cup cut-up preserved ginger into syrup and swirl through vanilla ice cream.
7. QUICK BISCUIT TORTONI: Combine 1/3 cup macaroon crumbs, 2 tablespoons diced candied cherries, and 1/4 cup chopped salted almonds. Mix in with vanilla ice cream.
8. FIG DELICIOUS: Over low heat, cook 8 crumbled fig cookies with 1/2 cup light cream until blended. Add 1/2 cup chopped salted peanuts and 1/2 cup peanut butter; stir into vanilla ice cream.
